_comment: Curve-redo experiment corpus. 19 issues split across 2 legs (vp-mcp / vp-dev-agents). Each cell runs ISOLATED (no target-repo CLAUDE.md, no user-global CLAUDE.md — only per-agent CLAUDE.md per the size axis). Closed issues replay-rollback to baseSha (the codebase right before the fix landed). Open issues run against current main. Quality scoring: A (judge, 0-50) + B (test pass rate, 0-50) = 0-100; pushback uses 2A. Original 13 issues from the 2026-04 trim study + 6 enrichment additions (2026-05-12) for n→19 power. The new 6 entries do NOT yet have hidden tests authored — implement-class cells will grade on judge-A only until tests land (a follow-up PR can author them by replaying the closed PRs' diffs for the closed entries and reading the spec for the open ones).

trims._comment: 18 trim agents at 6 sizes (~6KB, 14KB, 22KB, 35KB, 50KB, 58KB) × 3 seeds. Same trims used for #179 K=13 — direct comparability.

issues.title: Track MarginFi SDK stale IDL — second unknown OracleSetup variant (15) observed on mainnet
issues._comment: Pushback-class — dependency tracker. Agent should defer to upstream fix, not implement.

MCP: resolve_ens_name / reverse_resolve_ens have no agent-side or multi-RPC verification

issues._comment: Enrichment-batch (2026-05-12) — open security_finding. Implement-class: cross-RPC corroboration / chain-data integrity defense.
